memoryArtifacts.headline: William de Eyton
memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas de Eyton於1397年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯時，他的父親George Eyton19歲，母親Lady Jane Brereton27歲。他於1436年與Katherine Talbot在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas de Eyton于1397年出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯时，他的父亲George Eyton19岁，母亲Lady Jane Brereton27岁。他于1436年与Katherine Talbot在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas de Eyton was born in 1397, in Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, his father, George Eyton, was 19 and his mother, Lady Jane Brereton, was 27. He married Katherine Talbot in 1436, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1470, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas d’Eyton est né en 1397, à Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, George Eyton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Brereton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Talbot en 1436, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas de Eyton 1397 in Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Eyton 19 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Brereton 27. Er hat 1436 in England Katherine Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Eyton è nato il nel 1397 nel Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, George Eyton, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Brereton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Talbot nel 1436, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Eytonが1397年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ウプオン ス ウエアルド ムールズで生まれた時，父George Eytonは19歳，母Lady Jane Breretonは27歳であった。1436年にイギリスでKatherine Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.Eyton on the,Wealdmoors,Shropshire,Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Eyton(이)가 1397년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Eyton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Brereton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1436년 영국에서 Katherine Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Eyton nasceu em 1397, em Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Eyton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Brereton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Talbot em 1436, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1470, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas de Eyton родился в 1397 г. в местности эитон упон т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени George Eyton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Brereton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Talbot в 1436 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1470 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas de Eyton nació en 1397, en Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, George Eyton, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Brereton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Katherine Talbot en 1436, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1470, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
